value_signal: ElevenLabs offers startup grants for building conversational AI agents, with public pages advertising 12 months of free access and startup credits.
eligibility_or_region_notes: Best fit for startups building voice or conversational AI features into a product.
deadline_or_currentness: Public application page is current; no close date is stated on the source page.
evidence_gate: Grant approval plus visible usable credits or official onboarding confirmation.
ai_can_do_next: Draft a short product-fit memo that frames AI Monkey as a truthful conversational-AI startup only if that claim is accurate.
human_must_do_next: Human owner must confirm fit and submit the application if eligible.
automation_boundary: No login, application submission, account creation, passwords, OTP, private keys, KYC, tax, bank, or private data handling.
why_this_is_not_income_yet: The credits are real, but no approved application or usable credit balance has been verified.
suggested_next_check: If AI Monkey has a genuine voice-agent or conversational-AI product angle, prepare the shortest public-facts packet for the grant form.

income_gate.rule: Counts only after approved grant delivery or visible usable-credit delivery.
